confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name}? Keep the Spider-Man app closed so Home Assistant can hold the connection.

user.description: Select the Spider-Man figure to add.

init.title: Eye-expression control (optional)
init.description: Set a private-key path to enable the Eye expression control. It is driven over SSH (root) on the figure, separate from Bluetooth. Leave the key blank to disable it. Home Assistant must be able to reach the figure over SSH.

send_command.name: Send command
send_command.description: Sends a raw protocol command (messageId) to the figure.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The Spider-Man figure to send the command to.

command.name: Command
command.description: The operation name to send (e.g. START_PLAY, GET_BATTERY_STATUS).

data.name: Data
data.description: Optional DT payload string for the command.

connect_wifi.name: Connect to WiFi
connect_wifi.description: Provisions the figure onto a WiFi network over Bluetooth (CONNECT_TO_SSID).

password.name: Password
password.description: The WiFi password (sent over the encoded BLE frame).
